name: app-memory
description: Dev/test harness only — Mobius installs index.jsx as a single compiled module.

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && bash -n fetch.sh && python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('memory_runner.py', cfile='/tmp/app-memory-runner.pyc', doraise=True); py_compile.compile('memory_search.py', cfile='/tmp/app-memory-search.pyc', doraise=True)"
